name: agyb-aas-api-platform-builder
description: Install the "AAS API Platform Builder" workflow plugin from Antigravity Awesome Skills.

interface.shortDescription: Design language-agnostic API platforms with contracts, docs, endpoints, auth, security, load testing, and observability.
interface.longDescription: Design language-agnostic API platforms with contracts, docs, endpoints, auth, security, load testing, and observability. Complements Python API Builder with a language-agnostic API platform workflow from design and OpenAPI contracts to auth, security, documentation, load testing, and observability. Recommended for: Backend teams, Platform teams, Full-stack teams designing shared APIs. Not for: Python-only implementation guidance, Frontend UI polish. Covers API Design Principles, API Patterns, and 8 more skills.
defaultPrompt: Use this plugin to design an API platform with OpenAPI contracts, auth, docs, and observability.
Use this plugin to review this API for versioning, endpoint design, security, and load-test gaps.
Use this plugin to turn these product requirements into API endpoints and a contract-first implementation plan.
